title: crepis taraxacifolia var. hyemalis
intro: Crepis taraxacifolia var. hyemalis, also known as winter hawk's-beard or winter cress, is a biennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Crepis taraxacifolia var. hyemalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, support the immune system, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
